_comment: Distilled from PTCA, Systemic thrombolysis, CABG, IABP_Medco.pdf and PTCA, Systemic thrombolysis, CABG, IABP_PPD.CPD.pdf
min_doctor_qualification: M.Ch. or DNB (cardiovascular thoracic surgery) or equivalent
clinical_indications: Diffuse retrosternal pain, heaviness or constriction radiating to arm or neck or back, with sweating, with ST elevation in ECG
History of coronary artery disease (CAD)/ multiple risk factors for MI
Within 12 hours of symptom onset (for thrombolysis in PCI incapable centre)

clinical_thresholds.note: Positive Troponin Test/ Elevated Serial CPK-MB Levels

preauth.label: Cardiac enzymes (Troponins T/ I (if not available then CPK-MB)
Routine Biochemistry (Haemogram, urea, creatinine, electrolytes, sugar, fasting lipids, Liver function test, Urinalysis)

claim.label: Still image of the patient undergoing the procedure with date & time
Cardiac enzymes (Troponins T/ I (if not available then CPK-MB)

ppd_preauth.q: Absolute contraindications for Systemic Thrombolysis (for MI): i. Previous intra-cerebral haemorrhage/ stroke of unknown etiology; ii. Ischemic stroke in last 6 months; iii. CNS neoplasm or AV malformation; iv. Recent (within 1 month) major trauma/ surgery/ head injury; v. Recent (within 1month) major GI bleed; vi. Known bleeding tendency (except menstrual bleed); vii. Severe uncontrolled hypertension; viii. Aortic Dissection. (expected: false)

cpd_claim.q: Does the patient have indications (documentary evidence, physical examination) of Systemic thrombolysis (for MI) i.e. h/o Diffuse retrosternal chest pain, heaviness or constriction radiating to arm or neck or back, with sweating, with ST elevation in ECG; +/- history of coronary artery disease (CAD)/ multiple risk factors for MI
Are there absolute contraindications for thrombolysis (Refer 2.2.1 (B))?
Do procedure notes detail the steps of thrombolysis performed with invoice of thrombolytic agent used & outcomes of Procedure?
Are post procedure reports of 2D ECHO, Serial ECGs (Done 60-90 min after starting thrombolysis), Serial Cardiac enzymes (Troponin / CPK-MB) available?

Are the documents available to show monitoring of vitals (BP, Heart Rate), appropriate post-procedure care with continued medication (low molecular weight heparin), anti-ischemics, High dose Statins, Ace inhibitors, Beta blockers till PCI/PTCA if indicated/required or discharge of patient?

common_queries: Significant ST Elevation in ECG not documented.
Positive Troponin Test/ Elevated Serial CPK-MB Levels not documented.
Symptom onset time for thrombolysis is greater than 12 hours.
Presence of absolute contraindications for Systemic Thrombolysis.
Procedure notes not detailing steps of thrombolysis or missing invoice of thrombolytic agent.
Post procedure reports of 2D ECHO, Serial ECGs, or Cardiac enzymes not available.
Discharge summary not showing proper monitoring of vitals, post-procedure care or medications.
Invoice of thrombolytic agent used not uploaded at claim.

additional_information.special_empanelment: Cardiac catheterization lab, Cardiac Care Unit & qualified Cardiologist (for PTCA/ PCI/ IABP)
clinical_key_pointers: Therapy to be started within 10 min preferably
ECG to be done at 60-90 min after starting thrombolysis to assess whether thrombolysis is successful (>50% ST settlement with pain relief) or not
contraindications: Previous intra-cerebral haemorrhage/ stroke of unknown etiology
Recent (within 1 month) major trauma/ surgery/ head injury
